अथवा खो गए हA, को पासपोट िनयमावली 1980 के िनयम 8 के साथ पCठत उ$ अिधिनयम क धारा 5 के तहत िनधाCरत पासपोट शुक के भुगतान से छूट !दान करती है जो िनHिलिखत शतI के अधीन ह%गी अथात:- (क) पासपोट शुक% के भुगतान से इस !कार क छूट तिमलनाडू के केवल उन पासपोट धारक% को दी जाएगी िजनके पासपोट बाढ़ म1 न? हो गए हA अथवा खो गए हA; (ख) इस !कार क छूट का लाभ उठाने वाले सभी इKछुक आवेदक% को डुLलीकेट पासपोट जारी कए जाएंगे िजन पर पुराने पासपोट का Nयौरा अंकत होगा (ग) इस !कार क छूट 8 दसंबर, 2015 से तीन माह तक क अविध के िलए लागू रहेगी | [फा॰सं॰ VI/401/01/51/2015] मुPतेश कु॰ परदेशी, संयु$ सिचव एवं मुQय पासपोट अिधकारी !धान अिधिनयम (1967 का 15) और इसके तहत िनSिपत 1980 के िनयम भारत सरकार के शासकय राजपT म1 !कािशत कए गए | -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st March, 2016 G.S.R.272(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 22 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government, being of the opinion that it is necessary and expedient in the public interest so to do hereby exempts the passport holders whose passport got damaged or lost due to flood in the State of Tamil Nadu in November, 2015 from payment of passport fees specified under section 5 of the said Act, read with rule 8 of the Passports Rules, 1980 subject to the following conditions, namely :- (a) such exemption in payment of passport fees shall be applicable only to such passport holders of Tamil Nadu whose passports are damaged or lost in the flood; (b) duplicate passports shall be issued to all applicants desirous of availing such exemption with the same particulars as in their previous passports and for the remaining period of validity; (c) such exemption shall remain in force for a period of three months with effect from 8th December, 2015. [F. No. VI/401/01/51/2015] MUKTESH K. PARDESHI, Jt. Secy. and Chief Passport Officer The Principal Act (15 of 1967) and the Rules of 1980 framed thereunder were published in the official Gazette of Government of India. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
